3327030.name: Bunker Descent: Trapped
3327030.description:
Note: This is a work in progress and not a final product.

Dive into a thrilling adventure as you descend through the dark levels of a mysterious bunker. Each level is connected by an elevator that takes you deeper, but it won't be easy. You'll have to solve challenging puzzles and face intriguing obstacles to move forward. Your decisions shape the storyline, adding layers of suspense and tension at every turn. Combining elements of adventure and escape rooms, Bunker Descent keeps you on the edge of your seat with unexpected twists and a few scares. Ready to take the plunge?
3327030.supported_languages:
西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
